# chronosphere_trace_tail_sampling_rules (Resource)

Tail-sampling rules that match completed traces against filters and apply per-rule sample rates (with a default rate fallback) to decide which traces are retained after the full trace has been observed.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "chronosphere_trace_tail_sampling_rules" "rules" {
  default_sample_rate {
    enabled     = true
    sample_rate = 0.5
  }

  # Always keep error spans.
  rules {
    filter {
      span {
        match_type = "INCLUDE"
        error {
          value = true
        }
      }
    }
    sample_rate = 1.0
  }

  # Always keep slow spans.
  rules {
    filter {
      span {
        match_type = "INCLUDE"
        duration {
          min_secs = 1
        }
      }
    }
    sample_rate = 1.0
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `default_sample_rate` (Block List, Max: 1) Default sampling decision applied after the full trace is observed when no rule in `rules` matches. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--default_sample_rate))
- `rules` (Block List) Ordered list of tail-sampling rules evaluated after the full trace is observed. The first rule whose `filter` matches determines the sample rate; if none match, `default_sample_rate` is applied. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--rules))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--default_sample_rate"></a>
### Nested Schema for `default_sample_rate`

Required:

- `sample_rate` (Number) Fraction of matching traces to keep, in the range `[0.0, 1.0]`. `0` drops all matches, `1` keeps every match.

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether to override the platform default sample rate with `sample_rate`.


<a id="nestedblock--rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules`

Required:

- `filter` (Block List, Min: 1, Max: 1) Filter that selects traces and spans. A trace matches when its trace-level conditions hold and every `span` block is satisfied by at least one span in the trace. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--rules--filter))
- `sample_rate` (Number) Fraction of matching traces to keep, in the range `[0.0, 1.0]`. `0` drops all matches, `1` keeps every match.

Optional:

- `name` (String) Human-readable name of the rule.
- `system_name` (String) Stable identifier used as the metric label value on metrics emitted by this rule.

<a id="nestedblock--rules--filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.filter`

Optional:

- `scope_filter` (Block List, Max: 1) Scope filter that further restricts which spans within a matched trace contribute to metrics or sampling. Only spans matching `span_scopes` are included in aggregation. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter))
- `span` (Block List) Span-level conditions. Each block defines a set of conditions that must all be satisfied by a single span in the trace for the trace to match. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--rules--filter--span))
- `trace` (Block List, Max: 1) Trace-level conditions evaluated against the whole trace (aggregated duration and error status). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--rules--filter--trace))

<a id="nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.filter.scope_filter`

Optional:

- `span_scopes` (Block List) Span conditions that select which spans are aggregated. Spans must match at least one block to be included. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes))

<a id="nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.filter.scope_filter.span_scopes`

Optional:

- `duration` (Block List, Max: 1) Matches traces or spans whose duration in seconds falls within the inclusive `[min_secs, max_secs]` range. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--duration))
- `error` (Block List, Max: 1) Matches traces or spans where the target boolean field equals `value`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--error))
- `is_root_span` (Block List, Max: 1) Matches traces or spans where the target boolean field equals `value`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--is_root_span))
- `match_type` (String) Whether matching spans are included (`INCLUDE`) or excluded (`EXCLUDE`) from the scope. Defaults to `INCLUDE`.
- `operation` (Block List, Max: 1) Matches traces or spans where the target string field satisfies the match condition. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--operation))
- `parent_operation` (Block List, Max: 1) Matches traces or spans where the target string field satisfies the match condition. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--parent_operation))
- `parent_service` (Block List, Max: 1) Matches traces or spans where the target string field satisfies the match condition. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--parent_service))
- `service` (Block List, Max: 1) Matches traces or spans where the target string field satisfies the match condition. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--service))
- `span_count` (Block List, Max: 1) Matches traces where the number of spans satisfying the surrounding span conditions falls within the inclusive `[min, max]` range. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--span_count))
- `tag` (Block List) Matches spans whose tag (span attribute) with the given `key` has a value satisfying the nested string or numeric filter. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--tag))

<a id="nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--duration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.filter.scope_filter.span_scopes.duration`

Optional:

- `max_secs` (Number) Maximum duration in seconds, inclusive. Omit for no upper bound.
- `min_secs` (Number) Minimum duration in seconds, inclusive. Defaults to `0`.


<a id="nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--error"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.filter.scope_filter.span_scopes.error`

Required:

- `value` (Boolean) Boolean value the target field is compared against.


<a id="nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--is_root_span"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.filter.scope_filter.span_scopes.is_root_span`

Required:

- `value` (Boolean) Boolean value the target field is compared against.


<a id="nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--operation"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.filter.scope_filter.span_scopes.operation`

Optional:

- `in_values` (List of String) Set of strings tested against the target field. Used with `IN` and `NOT_IN` match types.
- `match` (String) Match operator applied to `value` or `in_values`. One of `EXACT`, `REGEX`, `IN`, or `NOT_IN`. Defaults to `EXACT`.
- `value` (String) Single string compared against the target field. Used with `EXACT` and `REGEX` match types.


<a id="nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--parent_operation"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.filter.scope_filter.span_scopes.parent_operation`

Optional:

- `in_values` (List of String) Set of strings tested against the target field. Used with `IN` and `NOT_IN` match types.
- `match` (String) Match operator applied to `value` or `in_values`. One of `EXACT`, `REGEX`, `IN`, or `NOT_IN`. Defaults to `EXACT`.
- `value` (String) Single string compared against the target field. Used with `EXACT` and `REGEX` match types.


<a id="nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--parent_service"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.filter.scope_filter.span_scopes.parent_service`

Optional:

- `in_values` (List of String) Set of strings tested against the target field. Used with `IN` and `NOT_IN` match types.
- `match` (String) Match operator applied to `value` or `in_values`. One of `EXACT`, `REGEX`, `IN`, or `NOT_IN`. Defaults to `EXACT`.
- `value` (String) Single string compared against the target field. Used with `EXACT` and `REGEX` match types.


<a id="nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--service"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.filter.scope_filter.span_scopes.service`

Optional:

- `in_values` (List of String) Set of strings tested against the target field. Used with `IN` and `NOT_IN` match types.
- `match` (String) Match operator applied to `value` or `in_values`. One of `EXACT`, `REGEX`, `IN`, or `NOT_IN`. Defaults to `EXACT`.
- `value` (String) Single string compared against the target field. Used with `EXACT` and `REGEX` match types.


<a id="nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--span_count"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.filter.scope_filter.span_scopes.span_count`

Optional:

- `max` (Number) Maximum number of matching spans, inclusive. `0` means no upper bound.
- `min` (Number) Minimum number of matching spans, inclusive. Defaults to `0`.


<a id="nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--tag"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.filter.scope_filter.span_scopes.tag`

Optional:

- `key` (String) Name of the span tag (span attribute) inspected by this filter.
- `numeric_value` (Block List, Max: 1) Matches traces or spans where the target numeric field satisfies the comparison against `value`. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--tag--numeric_value))
- `value` (Block List, Max: 1) Matches traces or spans where the target string field satisfies the match condition. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--tag--value))

<a id="nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--tag--numeric_value"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.filter.scope_filter.span_scopes.tag.numeric_value`

Required:

- `comparison` (String) Numeric comparison operator (for example `EQUALS`, `GREATER_THAN`, `LESS_THAN_OR_EQUAL`).
- `value` (Number) Numeric value the target field is compared against.


<a id="nestedblock--rules--filter--scope_filter--span_scopes--tag--value"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules.filter.scope_filter.span_scopes.tag.value`

Optional:

- `in_values` (List of String) Set of strings tested against the target field. Used with `IN` and `NOT_IN` match types.
- `match` (String) Match operator applied to `value` or `in_values`. One of `EXACT`, `REGEX`, `IN`, or `NOT_IN`. Defaults to `EXACT`.
- `value` (String) Single string compared against the target field. Used with `EXACT` and `REGEX` match types.
